summary: Iteration 2 E2E testing complete. Backend: 34/34 pytest pass (25 regression + 9 new for brokers/multi-leg/WS) via public URL. Frontend smoke: login, ticker bar streaming 6 symbols with live updates, /brokers route renders 5 broker cards, Zerodha connect dialog with correct fields, SAVE+TEST shows graceful kiteconnect-SDK-not-installed toast, disconnect works, multi-leg builder presets+custom leg add work, Place Basket fills orders atomically and new positions appear. Encryption verified at MongoDB level (credentials_enc present, plaintext absent).

issues: After clicking 'Place Basket', success toast appears very briefly (auto-dismiss <4s). Consider extending duration so users on slower screens can read confirmation; orders still execute correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: brokers/__init__.py reads ENCRYPTION_KEY at import time with os.environ[...] — will crash backend boot if env var unset. Good fail-fast but document as a required env var explicitly.
server.py is now ~600 lines and includes brokers + multi-leg + WS mounting; recommend splitting into routers per domain (auth, market, strategies, backtest, paper, brokers, ws) for maintainability.
ws_feed.py uses module-level _state/_open dicts — shared across all clients. Fine for mock; for real broker WS this needs per-connection isolation.

/api/paper/order/multi-leg loops paper_order(payload, user) sequentially with no rollback on partial failure — if leg 2 fails (e.g., invalid strike), leg 1 already filled and basket is half-open. Document atomicity caveat or wrap in transaction/rollback.

/api/brokers/{name}/test returns HTTP 200 even on status='error'. This matches the requested spec (graceful), but consider exposing a separate health endpoint for observability that returns 5xx for true outages.
Multi-leg endpoint trusts MultiLegLeg.side as raw string — no enum/validator (BUY/SELL). Add Pydantic Literal for tighter validation.
seed_data_creation: Tests create+delete broker_connections for zerodha/rmoney under demo user, multi-leg baskets, NIFTY paper positions. test_credentials_stored_encrypted asserts directly against MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features (encrypted broker vault, mock WS tick stream, multi-leg builder) confirmed end-to-end. WS works at wss://<host>/api/ws/ticks (also non-/api). Use the websockets.sync.client for python-side tests. For multi-leg, use chain['rows'][len/2]['strike'] as ATM or the row closest to spot. Existing regression unchanged from iteration_1 (still passing).
rca_of_the_issue: No new bugs found; only minor UX observation on toast duration for basket success which does not affect functionality.
